title: Bergentrückung Asgore
body:
This mod adds... Bergentrückung Asgore (specifically asgore and a truck).

You can summon them using the summon command.

When summoning his truck, his truck will just sit there and make a ton of noise lol.

When summoning asgore he just... does nothing lol.

WHY would you even download this????

(It's pretty funny lol)

This mod is pretty stupid so if you want to download this don't expect anything too good lol.

**If you showcase this mod, please credit me in the video by adding a link to the mod or a shoutout! It helps :)**

**If you liked this mod, consider supporting my goal on on Ko-fi 😄**

**If you play Roblox, consider testing my friend’s Roblox game by joining: https://www.roblox.com/games/5465638320**
